calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq.  Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-30-2019 is admitted to probate. Katherine Margaret Erigero is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrignton is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing on filing of petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report of status of administration is set for Nov-09-2027.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
